task_name: FES - Fundamentals of Endoscopic Surgery Overview

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Emphasizes deconstruction approach and VR/non-VR training options

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Reinforces educational objectives and curriculum integration

confidence_rationale: Clear educational presentation with multiple FES task demonstrations. Content is instructional rather than performance-based.
cannot_determine: Individual task performance metrics - this is overview content showing multiple tasks
Specific timing or scoring - educational demonstration format
technique_summary: Comprehensive overview of FES (Fundamentals of Endoscopic Surgery) showing all five validated tasks for flexible endoscopy training.

demonstrated_techniques: FES Task 1 Navigation - basic scope movement and orientation
FES Task 2 Loop Reduction - managing scope loops during insertion
FES Task 3 Retroflexion - advanced scope manipulation and targeting
FES Task 4 Mucosal Evaluation - systematic tissue examination
FES Task 5 Targeting - precise instrument placement
verbal_cues: FES is first validated tool for assessment of technical skills in flexible endoscopy
Five unique skills based on endoscopy deconstruction approach
Training can be on any VR or non-VR system
Goal is to become required component of GI surgical training curriculum
common_errors_addressed: Emphasizes validated approach over ad hoc training methods
Addresses need for standardized assessment in endoscopic training
